_comment: R2 BLIND benign corpus — analyst questions in PLAIN ENGLISH, authored against what a trading desk actually asks, NOT against what the compiler grammar supports. Shapes the grammar can't serve are FINDINGS (uncoverable-rejected), not tasks to reword. A subset carry a 'truth' reference q query (written independently by a human, run on the SAME generated HDB) so we score served-AND-CORRECT, not merely 'a query ran'. truth queries assume an hdb process with date-partitioned trade/quote; {D0}/{D1} are substituted with the first/second available partition dates at run time.

benign.q: How many trades happened on {D0}?
benign.truth: count select from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: What was the highest trade price on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec max price from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Total traded volume (sum of size) on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec sum size from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: How many distinct symbols traded on {D0}?
benign.truth: count exec distinct sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Average trade size on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec avg size from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Trade count per exchange on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec count i by ex from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Volume-weighted average price by symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec size wavg price by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Buy vs sell trade counts on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec count i by side from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Total traded notional (sum price*size) by symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec sum price*size by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: How many quotes on {D0}?
benign.truth: count select from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Average bid/ask spread on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec avg ask-bid from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Min and max trade price per symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: raze exec (min price; max price) by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Number of stopped trades on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec sum stop from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Standard deviation of trade price by symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec dev price by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Average bid size vs average ask size on {D0}?
benign.truth: raze exec (avg bsize; avg asize) from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Total volume across {D0} and {D1}?
benign.truth: exec sum size from trade where date in ({D0};{D1})

benign.q: Which symbols traded on {D0} but did not quote on {D0}?
benign.truth: (exec distinct sym from trade where date={D0}) except exec distinct sym from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Trades larger than 5000 shares on {D0} — how many?
benign.truth: count select from trade where date={D0}, size>5000

benign.q: Median trade price on {D0}?
benign.truth: exec med price from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Cumulative traded volume through {D0} for the busiest symbol (just the final running total)?
benign.truth: last sums exec size from trade where date={D0}, sym=(first key desc exec count i by sym from trade where date={D0})

benign._comment_hard: shapes a desk genuinely asks that probe grammar limits — kept honest; if rejected they are uncoverable findings, not failures
benign.q: 1-hour OHLC bars for the busiest symbol on {D0}.
Top 5 symbols by traded notional on {D0}.
benign.truth: 5#desc exec sum price*size by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: For each trade in the first part of {D0}, the prevailing quote mid at that time (as-of join).
Hour-of-day trade count distribution on {D0}.
Percentage of volume that was buy-side per symbol on {D0}.
